caption: A news broadcast features a male presenter in a dark suit, white shirt, and maroon tie, positioned in a studio with a blue and green digital background displaying "PLUS POLITICS." To his right is a smaller inset window showing another man wearing a traditional red cap and black attire, identified by the text "ON THE PHONE," "OLUSOLA OYEKANMI," "POLITICAL ANALYST," and "LAGOS." A lower-third banner displays the headline "NIGERIA NEEDS ME – BOLA TINUBU" in black text on a white background, with a purple "PLUS POLITICS" tag. At the bottom, a red bar contains the word "SUBSCRIBE" and the URL "WWW.YOUTUBE.COM/PLUSTVAFRICA." Across the sequence of frames, the presenter remains in place, speaking while gesturing slightly, and the layout of the screen, including the logos and text overlays, stays consistent.
